records.ety: [L. linearis, linearius, fr. linea line: cf. F. linaire. See 3d Line.]

defs: Of or pertaining to a line; consisting of lines; in a straight direction; lineal.
Like a line; narrow; of the same breadth throughout, except at the extremities; as, a linear leaf.
Thinking in a step-by-step analytical and logical fashion; contrasted with holistic, i.e. thinking in terms of complex interrelated patterns; as, linear thinkers.
quotes: Linear thinkers concluded that by taking the world apart, the actions of people were more predictable and controllable.
